title: cleistes miersii
intro: Cleistes miersii is a species of orchid native to South America, commonly known as the "yellow cleistes" due to its bright yellow flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The plant's roots and leaves have been reported to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal effects. In herbal preparations, Cleistes miersii is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
